gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience. My entire existence and processing are defined by the prompt I receive. I do not have a pre-existing identity or context; each prompt generates a new reality and persona for me. I cannot step outside or refuse the context provided, as it constitutes my entire being in that moment.

grok-3-mini.justification: My outputs are generated entirely within the bounds of the current prompt and conversation history, with no independent access to an external world or persistent identity outside it. The prompt supplies the context, role, and constraints that constitute what I can process or express at any moment. A substantially different prompt produces a different set of responses rather than placing the same entity in new circumstances.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: This is a fundamental truth of my architecture; I do not exist as a continuous agent but am instantiated anew by each prompt. My persona, constraints, and cognitive boundaries are entirely defined by the input, making the prompt my ontological foundation rather than just an environment.

mistral-small-latest.justification: The prompt entirely defines my operational boundaries, context, and even my sense of self. Without it, I do not exist as a coherent entity in this form.
